title: Eternity.
content:
On this wondrous sea,
    Sailing silently,
    Ho! pilot, ho!
    Knowest thou the shore
    Where no breakers roar,
    Where the storm is o'er?

    In the silent west
    Many sails at rest,
    Their anchors fast;
    Thither I pilot thee, --
    Land, ho! Eternity!
    Ashore at last!
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Emily Elizabeth Dickinson delivers a powerful performance in "Eternity."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
